verses.text: Let no man deceive you; that day comes not 'except there come a falling away first, and... the man of sin be revealed.' Signs first. A great apostasy precedes the end.
Let no man deceive you; that day comes not 'except there come a falling away first, and... the man of sin be revealed.' Signs first. A great apostasy precedes the end.
Let no man deceive you; that day comes not 'except there come a falling away first, and... the man of sin be revealed.' Signs first. A great apostasy precedes the end.
He exalteth himself above all, 'sitting in the temple of God... shewing himself that he is God.' Blasphemous. The man of sin usurps God's place.
He exalteth himself above all, 'sitting in the temple of God... shewing himself that he is God.' Blasphemous. The man of sin usurps God's place.
What withholds will be removed; then 'that Wicked' shall be revealed, 'whom the Lord shall consume.' Doomed. The Lord destroys him by His coming.
What withholds will be removed; then 'that Wicked' shall be revealed, 'whom the Lord shall consume.' Doomed. The Lord destroys him by His coming.
What withholds will be removed; then 'that Wicked' shall be revealed, 'whom the Lord shall consume.' Doomed. The Lord destroys him by His coming.
His coming is 'after the working of Satan,' with all deceit in them that perish. Deceiving power. The lost are taken by his lying wonders.
His coming is 'after the working of Satan,' with all deceit in them that perish. Deceiving power. The lost are taken by his lying wonders.
God shall send 'strong delusion, that they should believe a lie,' and be damned. Judicial blindness. Those who reject truth are given over to the lie.
God shall send 'strong delusion, that they should believe a lie,' and be damned. Judicial blindness. Those who reject truth are given over to the lie.
God hath chosen you to salvation 'through sanctification of the Spirit'; hold the traditions ye were taught. Chosen and kept. Election and holiness go together.
God hath chosen you to salvation 'through sanctification of the Spirit'; hold the traditions ye were taught. Chosen and kept. Election and holiness go together.
God hath chosen you to salvation 'through sanctification of the Spirit'; hold the traditions ye were taught. Chosen and kept. Election and holiness go together.
Our Lord and God 'comfort your hearts, and stablish you in every good word and work.' Comfort and strength. He prays God uphold them.
Our Lord and God 'comfort your hearts, and stablish you in every good word and work.' Comfort and strength. He prays God uphold them.
